seeed_ir_sender_create.tooltip: Create an IRLib2 infrared emitter object; Wio Terminal automatically uses the built-in WIO_IR emitter pin

seeed_ir_raw_sender_create.tooltip: Create an IRsendRaw object for sending the raw infrared timing array

seeed_ir_send.message0: Infrared emission %1 Protocol %2 Data %3 Additional/digits %4 Frequency kHz %5
seeed_ir_send.tooltip: Call IRsend.send(protocol, data, data2, kHz) to send the specified protocol infrared code; Sony commonly uses data2 to represent the number of digits, and NEC commonly uses 0

seeed_ir_send_nec.message0: Infrared Emission NEC %1 Data %2 Frequency kHz %3
seeed_ir_send_nec.tooltip: Sending a 32-bit infrared code using NEC protocol, suitable for the TV power supply example in the Wio Terminal tutorial

seeed_ir_wio_send.message0: Wio built-in infrared transmission protocol %1 data %2 additional/digits %3 frequency kHz %4
seeed_ir_wio_send.tooltip: No need to manually create objects, just use Wio Terminal's built-in infrared transmitter to send infrared codes

seeed_ir_send_raw.message0: Raw infrared emission %1 Timing %2 Frequency kHz %3
seeed_ir_send_raw.tooltip: Send raw infrared signals in microsecond timing array, for example 9000,4500,560,560

seeed_ir_receiver_create.message0: Create IR Receiver %1 Decoder %2 Protocol %3 Pin %4
seeed_ir_receiver_create.tooltip: Creates an IRrecvPCI receiver and IRdecode decoder object and loads only the selected IRLib2 protocol; the receiver uses the specified digital input pin

seeed_ir_receiver_enable.tooltip: Call enableIRIn() to start or resume infrared reception

seeed_ir_on_receive.tooltip: Automatically decode after receiving a complete infrared frame, execute internal building blocks, and then resume reception

seeed_ir_receiver_available.tooltip: Returns getResults() whether a complete frame of infrared signal is received

seeed_ir_decoder_decode.tooltip: Call IRdecode.decode() to parse the current receive buffer

seeed_ir_decoder_get.tooltip: Read the protocol number, data, address or number of bits in the decoder

seeed_ir_decoder_protocol_name.tooltip: Convert protocolNum to protocol name string

seeed_ir_decoder_dump.tooltip: Print decoding results and original timing via Serial for easy copying to Raw send block

seeed_ir_receiver_resume.message0: Infrared reception %1 prepares for the next frame
seeed_ir_receiver_resume.tooltip: Manually call enableIRIn() to resume the next reception in the custom reception process
